briefdescription.para: Initialize a DALI Slave Control Gear instance.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, error code otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Process an incoming DALI Forward Frame on a Slave Control Gear node.

parameterdescription.para: [out] 8-bit response payload (if has_resp is set to true).
[out] Set to true if a backward response frame must be transmitted.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, error code on invalid parameters.

briefdescription.para: Encode a byte sequence into Manchester bi-phase bits.

parameterdescription.para: Output uint16_t array (minimum 16 elements for bi-phase pairs).

briefdescription.para: Decode Manchester bi-phase bit pairs into a byte value.

parameterdescription.para: Input uint8_t array containing bi-phase pairs.

briefdescription.para: Digital Addressable Lighting Interface (DALI / IEC 62386) Protocol Stack implementation.
